TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Bob_Allen, title = Bob_Allen, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bob_Allen} }

S.FORM: Bob Allen nalecuhan i Amilika, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Bob Allen i 1968 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 6 ku uwac atu silsil 71, namapili' tu nu San Francisco Warriors putiput. 7 bulad 17 demiad, 1946 a mihca, Bob Allen, miunduay.
S.PHON: bob ar~…ær~…æ…ôn nar~…æ…ô ¶uƒßan i amir~…æika, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~…æi miunduaj nu amir~…æika nba nisakaput, paƒßanƒßanan tu kawaw ajza. bob ar~…ær~…æ…ôn i **** a miƒß ¶an nba sapapir~…æi î~ ° mimar~…æiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwa ¶ atu sir~…æsir~…æ **, namapir~…æi î~ ° tu nu san fran ¶is ¶o warriors putiput. * bur~…æad ** d…ômiad, **** a miƒß ¶a, bob ar~…ær~…æ…ôn, miunduaj.
S.FORM: Bob Allen nalecuhan i Amilika, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Bob Allen i 1968 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 6 ku uwac atu silsil 71, namapili' tu nu San Francisco Warriors putiput. 7 bulad 17 demiad, 1946 a mihca, Bob Allen, miunduay.
